sent_simp: 以前人们靠收报来获取远方的消息。
sent_trad: 以前人們靠收報來獲取遠方的消息。
pinyin: Yǐqián rénmen kào shōu bào lái huòqǔ yuǎnfāng de xiāoxi.
english: In the old days, people relied on receiving telegraphs to get news from afar.

sent_simp: 这种材料具有热电效应，受热后会产生电荷。
sent_trad: 這種材料具有熱電效應，受熱後會產生電荷。
pinyin: Zhè zhǒng cáiliào jùyǒu rèdiàn xiàoyìng, shòu rè hòu huì chǎnshēng diànhè.
english: This material has a pyroelectric effect — when heated, it generates an electric charge.

sent_simp: 传说世界最初是一片混沌，天地尚未分开。
sent_trad: 傳說世界最初是一片混沌，天地尚未分開。
pinyin: Chuánshuō shìjiè zuìchū shì yī piàn hùndùn, tiāndì shàngwèi fēnkāi.
english: Legend has it that the world was originally a formless chaos, with heaven and earth not yet separated.
